pageContext.name: Mighty Nein Portrait Series: Yasha
pageContext.description: I don't want this fear anymore.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Mighty Nein Portrait Series: Yasha Fine Art Print, an electrifying new Critical Role art print by artist Sam Hogg.  Inspired by Art Nouveau portraiture, Sam Hogg captures the beauty, brilliance, and badassery of the heroes of Critical Role: Campaign 2 in this collectible art series. The Yasha Fine Art Print centers the angelic Warrior of the Mighty Nein in the eye of her own personal storm, surrounded by runes and retrospectives encapsulating her tumultuous past ­— including her late wife Zuala, Obann and the Laughing Hand, her collection of swords, and a grave reflection on her time as the Orphanmaker.  Each Mighty Nein Portrait Series: Yasha Fine Art Print features an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the official Critical Role collection offered by Sideshow. Available both unframed and in a custom framed format, this radiant Critical Role collectible makes a mighty addition to any Critter's collection. Pair Yasha with her other teammates in the Mighty Nein Portrait Series like Mollymauk, Beau, Fjord, Jester, Caduceus, Caleb, Veth, and the final Hands of Fate illustration to assemble the greatest adventuring team this side of Exandria in your home.  Bring calm to the raging storm with the Mighty Nein Portrait Series: Yasha Fine Art Print by Sam Hogg today.
